caption: The video displays a promotional screen for a trading seminar. The screen is split vertically; the left side features a man wearing a white dress shirt and glasses, positioned against a backdrop of trading charts. Above him, text reads "Tom O'Brien Timing the Trade All Day Webinar," and below him, it says "Friday, June 10th Live from 9 a.m. - 2 p.m. ET." To the right of the man is a graphic that says "THE ART OF TIMING THE TRADE." The right side of the screen contains a white background with black text titled "TOM O'BRIEN TIMING THE TRADE ALL DAY SEMINAR JUNE 10TH, 2022." This section includes a "Checkout" link and details for a two-part session titled "Timing the Trade, Your Ultimate Trading Mastery System," listing specific times and a numbered list of topics covered, such as "1. Quality Volume" and "2. ABC Structures." The scene remains completely static across all frames.
